title: Days Between Dates Calculator
shortDescription: Find the number of days between two dates, including exact spans for deadlines, schedules, and date comparisons.
metaDescription: Find the exact number of days between two dates for deadlines, schedules, and date comparisons.
intro: Enter two dates and get the exact day count between them.
overview:
Use this calculator when you need the exact span between two dates for planning, records, or date comparisons. It returns the number of days between a start date and an end date so you can verify timelines without counting manually.

The result is useful for understanding project gaps, rental periods, billing ranges, leave requests, and event planning. If your dates cross months or years, the calculator still gives the full interval based on the dates you enter.
howItWorks: Choose the start date and the end date.
The calculator determines the full day difference between the two dates.
Read the result and, if needed, adjust the dates to compare another interval.

useCases.title: Project timeline gap
useCases.description: Check how many days separate a planning date and a delivery date in a work schedule.

useCases.title: Rental or booking period
useCases.description: Measure the length of a stay, reservation, or hire period between two calendar dates.

useCases.title: Leave and absence records
useCases.description: Confirm the number of days covered by vacation, sick leave, or unpaid leave.

useCases.title: Billing or contract span
useCases.description: Verify the interval covered by an invoice period, subscription term, or contract date range.

examples.title: Invoice period
examples.description: Useful for checking a monthly billing window that does not start on the first day of the month.

examples.title: Event planning
examples.description: Shows a span that crosses into a new year.

examples.title: Leave record
examples.description: Helps confirm a short absence period between two work dates.

faq.question: Does the calculator include both the start date and the end date?
faq.answer: The result is based on the interval between the two selected dates. If you need an inclusive count, you must add one day after checking the displayed difference.

faq.question: What happens if the end date is earlier than the start date?
faq.answer: The dates must be entered in the correct order for a positive result. If you reverse them, the span is interpreted in the opposite direction or may not match the timeline you expect.

faq.question: Why is the result not the same as counting days on a calendar by hand?
faq.answer: Manual counting often includes the first or last day by mistake. This calculator reports the actual date gap, so the result can differ from an inclusive count.

faq.question: Can I use dates from different months or years?
faq.answer: Yes. The calculator works across month and year boundaries, so it is suitable for long gaps as well as short ranges.
